name: krushnai-amrutulya
description: Luxury tea brand static website — Krushnai Amrutulya

scripts.package:hostinger: npm run build:hostinger && powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path dist-hostinger.zip) { Remove-Item dist-hostinger.zip -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path 'dist/*' -DestinationPath 'dist-hostinger.zip'"
